_doc: Regression ledger — confirmed findings converted into standing checks. Loaded in Stage 1 by scripts/check_regressions.py: every entry whose trigger matches the diff MUST appear in the plan (status planned + journey, or not-applicable with a reason). Fix mode appends a new entry for every confirmed-then-fixed finding. See references/regression-ledger.md.

entries.found: 2026-05-27 review 209 (AiCreditType::Refund match-arm 500); RECURRED 2026-06-12 in production (PR 326 added Reservation, Sentry 127436080, hotfix v3.3.7)
entries.check: For every enum that gained a case, grep all match()/match-arm consumers (tables, badges, labels, colors) and open EVERY UI surface that renders that enum. Start with sysadmin AI Credit Transactions; render rows that include the new case value.
repro: create/locate a record using the new enum case (e.g. a credit transaction of the new type)
open the listing page that renders the enum (e.g. AI Credit Transactions)

entries.found: 2026-05-21..06-12 cross-project (Journey customer-reported double-click Continue bug alive 3 weeks; checks-matrix double-submit row routinely skipped)
entries.check: Double-click / double-fire the primary submit or money-moving action on every touched form. Exactly one side effect may persist.
repro: click the primary action twice within ~300ms (or dispatch the Livewire action twice)
expect: one persisted record / one transaction; fail: duplicates or 500

entries.found: 2026-05 manual testing (CSV row with empty name imported as company name='')
entries.check: Import a CSV containing a row with the required name column empty; the row must be rejected with a visible error, never silently created blank.
repro: upload a CSV with one valid row and one row with empty name
expect: valid row imported, empty-name row surfaced as an error; fail: company with empty name exists

entries.found: 2026-06 (non-panel routes writing custom_fields without TenantContextService iterated ALL tenants — 504 + cross-tenant leak)
entries.check: Any non-panel write path touching custom_fields must run inside an explicit tenant context. Verify the write lands scoped to the acting team only and responds promptly (no full-tenant iteration).
repro: as Team A, perform the touched write with custom_fields populated (API call or chat tool approval)
expect: values visible on the record in Team A only, response < 5s
switch to Team B (in-app switcher) and confirm no leaked values; fail: timeout/504 or Team B sees data

entries.found: 2026-06 (TipTap composer x-ref=editor mount wiped by Livewire morph after first answer when wire:ignore missing)
entries.check: After any chat-surface change, send TWO consecutive messages in one conversation; the composer must stay mounted and editable after each assistant response.
repro: open AI chat, send a message, wait for the full streamed response
type and send a second message
expect: composer accepts input and second send succeeds; fail: message box unresponsive/unmounted
